dlls.name: cnc-ddraw
dlls.description: DirectDraw replacement for classic 2D games via OpenGL/D3D9

companion_files.content:
[ddraw]
renderer=opengl
fullscreen=true
handlemouse=true
adjmouse=true
devmode=0
maxgameticks=0
nonexclusive=false
singlecpu=true

dlls.name: dgvoodoo2
dlls.description: DirectX 1-7 and Glide to D3D11 wrapper — essential for early 3D games (1995-2002)

companion_files.content:
[General]
OutputAPI = direct3d11
FullScreenMode = true

[DirectX]
DisableAndPassThru = false
VideoCard = dgVoodoo Virtual 3D Accelerated Card
VRAM = 256
Filtering = appdriven

[Glide]
VideoCard = voodoo_2

dlls.name: dxwrapper
dlls.description: DirectDraw and Direct3D 1-9 compatibility wrapper with dd7to9 conversion

companion_files.content:
[Compatibility]
Dd7to9 = 1
D3d8to9 = 0

[dd7to9]
Enabled = 1
SetSwapEffect = 2
SetResolution = 0

[dinput]
Enabled = 1

dlls.name: dxvk
dlls.description: Vulkan-based D3D9/10/11 implementation — requires MoltenVK (included in Gcenx Wine builds)
